description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Those who love elegant classics can wear this piece with tonal outfits and add one vibrant, matching piece in the ensemble. Height: 37cm Width: 37cm Depth: 8cm Made of smooth leatherite with colour block patch on the front and a brand badge Two leatherette shoulder handles One main zippered compartment with a zippered separator and a zippered pocket and two pouches One zippered pocket at the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
